title: F-s5x flight avionics system
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''F-s5x flight avionics system''' was designed by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] for use in their advanced [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE/ad Avenger]] and [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE/D Defender]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]].

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=The Stele Chronicles|book=Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)}} {{1stm}}
